name: Haystacks
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butterscotch morsels in a pan over low heat.
2. Remove the pan from the heat when the morsels are completely melted.
3. Stir in the cooked Chow mein noodles and toasted coconut until combined.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto waxed paper.
5. Allow the haystacks to cool before serving.
